title: Hamilton's Object Revisited: A challenging source redshift of a strong lensing configuration
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables, accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics, comments welcome!
summary: Low-resolution spectrographs used to have difficulties to determine redshifts of galaxies at $z\approx1$ and $z\approx3$. Spectral emission and absorption lines of magnesium and iron redshifted to $z\approx1$ fall close to hydrogen, silicon, and oxygen lines at $z\approx3$. Here, we demonstrate that, even with modern, integrated field unit spectrographs, this task remains challenging. Hamilton's object, a blue star-forming galaxy, gravitationally lensed into three multiple images by the galaxy cluster SDSS J223010.47-081017.8 is such a case. Using the Blue Keck Cosmic Web Imager, its redshift was determined as $z=0.82$, while its MOIRCS spectrum hinted at $z=3.201$. To resolve the ambiguity, we completely re-analyse the Blue KCWI spectra of all three multiple images including the star-forming region in the outskirts. We employ a new data reduction pipeline, PypeIt, signal enhancement, and line fitting by Python-routines. The re-evaluation confirms the previous result based on 6 absorption features, $z=0.820 \pm 0.001$ and 4 emission features, $z=0.821 \pm 0.002$. The alternative $z=3.199\pm 0.003$, based on 6 absorption and 2 emission lines is a worse fit, also compared to other spectra. Moreover, we find the MOIRCS spectrum inconclusive: Observations cover two of three multiple images, with the slit for image C only covering its central bulge; furthermore the pixel-to-wavelength calibration requires a nightsky-emission-line calibration due to a missing calibration arc lamp. New MOIRCS observations are needed to verify that Hamilton's object has the smallest separation in angular diameter distance between lensing cluster and source galaxy among the known cluster-scale strong lenses.

AI.tldr: 通过重新分析光谱数据，确认Hamilton天体的红移为z=0.82，而非之前MOIRCS光谱暗示的z=3.201，解决了低分辨率光谱仪在红移测量上的模糊性问题。
AI.motivation: 低分辨率光谱仪在测量z≈1和z≈3星系红移时存在困难，因为镁和铁的光谱线在不同红移下会与氢、硅、氧的谱线重叠。Hamilton天体作为引力透镜星系，其红移测量存在z=0.82和z=3.201两种矛盾结果，需要澄清。
AI.method: 重新分析Blue KCWI光谱数据，使用新的数据处理管道PypeIt，结合信号增强和Python程序进行谱线拟合。对三个多重像的光谱进行全面重新评估，包括外围的恒星形成区域。
AI.result: 重新分析确认红移为z=0.820±0.001（基于6个吸收特征）和z=0.821±0.002（基于4个发射特征）。而z=3.199±0.003的假设拟合效果较差，且与其他光谱不一致。MOIRCS光谱因观测覆盖不完整和波长校准问题而不可靠。
AI.conclusion: Hamilton天体的红移确定为z≈0.82，解决了红移测量的模糊性。需要新的MOIRCS观测来验证该天体是否具有已知星系团尺度强透镜中透镜团与源星系之间最小的角直径距离分离。

recommendation.reason: 论文直接涉及强引力透镜系统（Hamilton天体），属于用户核心领域。虽然红移测量本身并非用户最关注的高红移星系动力学或气体性质，但该工作解决了透镜源的红移歧义，对后续透镜研究至关重要。用户画像中'lens'权重高，且论文涉及星系团尺度强透镜，与用户兴趣高度相关。
recommendation.topic_fit: 强引力透镜配置，直接匹配用户核心兴趣。
recommendation.method_fit: 光谱数据重新分析，使用PypeIt和谱线拟合，方法通用但非用户专长。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者不在核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 解决红移歧义，确认透镜源红移，具有一定新颖性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 低分辨率光谱仪过去难以确定红移约为1和红移约为3的星系的红移。镁和铁的谱线发射和吸收线红移到红移约为1时，与红移约为3时的氢、硅和氧谱线接近。在此，我们证明，即使使用现代积分场单元光谱仪，这项任务仍然具有挑战性。Hamilton天体是一个蓝色恒星形成星系，被星系团SDSS J223010.47-081017.8引力透镜成三个多重像，就是这样一个案例。使用蓝Keck宇宙网成像仪，其红移被确定为z=0.82，而其MOIRCS光谱则暗示红移为z=3.201。为解决这一歧义，我们完全重新分析了所有三个多重像（包括外围恒星形成区域）的蓝KCWI光谱。我们采用了新的数据归约管线PypeIt、信号增强以及基于Python例程的谱线拟合。重新评估确认了先前基于6个吸收特征的结果，z=0.820 ± 0.001，以及4个发射特征，z=0.821 ± 0.002。替代方案z=3.199±0.003基于6个吸收线和2个发射线，拟合效果较差，与其他光谱相比也是如此。此外，我们发现MOIRCS光谱不具决定性：观测覆盖了三个多重像中的两个，而像C的狭缝仅覆盖其中心核球；此外，由于缺少校准弧灯，像素到波长的校准需要夜天发射线校准。需要新的MOIRCS观测来验证Hamilton天体是否具有已知星系团尺度强透镜中透镜团与源星系之间最小的角直径距离分离。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，Hamilton天体的红移确定为z≈0.82，解决了红移测量的模糊性。需要新的MOIRCS观测来验证该天体是否具有已知星系团尺度强透镜中透镜团与源星系之间最小的角直径距离分离。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Multiple-image configurations that show a great amount of detail in their surface brightness profiles comparable to the one studied in this work. 1 1 1 The first column shows the cluster name, the second the multiple-image system as defined in the paper referenced in the sixth column. The third column contains the number of multiple images belonging to this background source discovered so far, then \(z_{{d}}\) and \(z_{{s}}\) denote the redshifts of the cluster and the source, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：多重像构型，其表面亮度轮廓细节丰富程度与本研究中的构型相当。1 1 1 第一列显示星系团名称，第二列显示第六列参考文献中定义的多重像系统。第三列包含迄今发现的属于该背景源的多重像数量，然后\(z_{{d}}\)和\(z_{{s}}\)分别表示星系团和源的红移。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: Slice of the KCWI data cube in which the Ly- \(\alpha\) blob has its peak flux (white pixel). The red and blue squares mark the 2 px \(\times\) 2 px and 4 px \(\times\) 4 px regions around the Ly- \(\alpha\) blob whose averaged raw spectra are shown in the central plot in the same colour. Centre: Raw spectra of the Ly- \(\alpha\) blob based on the single pixel (black), the 2 px \(\times\) 2 px (red), and the 4 px \(\times\) 4 px region (blue) marked in the left image. Right: Zoom into the wavelength range around the Ly- \(\alpha\) blob: background-subtracted spectra (dark lines, black, red, blue), error bars from the PypeIt reduction are plotted around the single-pixel spectrum, but are not visible. The grey, bright red, and bright blue lines including the pale-shaded areas show a Gaussian fit with 1- \(\sigma\) confidence bounds. The yellow regions in the left plot show the three multiple images as identified in Section 2.2 to illustrate that cross-contamination of their spectra by the Ly- \(\alpha\) blob is small.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：KCWI数据立方体的切片，其中Ly- \(\alpha\) 斑块具有其峰值流量（白色像素）。红色和蓝色方块标记了Ly- \(\alpha\) 斑块周围2 px \(\times\) 2 px和4 px \(\times\) 4 px的区域，其平均原始光谱以相同颜色显示在中心图中。中心图：基于单个像素（黑色）、2 px \(\times\) 2 px（红色）和4 px \(\times\) 4 px区域（蓝色）的Ly- \(\alpha\) 斑块的原始光谱，如左图所示。右图：放大到Ly- \(\alpha\) 斑块周围的波长范围：背景扣除光谱（暗线，黑色、红色、蓝色），来自PypeIt归约的误差棒绘制在单像素光谱周围，但不可见。灰色、亮红色和亮蓝色线（包括浅色阴影区域）显示了具有1- \(\sigma\) 置信区间的高斯拟合。左图中的黄色区域显示了第2.2节中识别的三个多重像，以说明它们的光谱被Ly- \(\alpha\) 斑块交叉污染的程度很小。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left: HST F110W filter-band observation with multiple images marked by yellow ellipses. The bulge and prominent star-formation region in the outer part of the galaxy are marked by yellow and orange circles, respectively . Magenta circles highlight additional bright objects in the field that may leave signatures in the white-light image of the KCWI data cube. Centre: Downsampled version of the HST F110W filter-band observation (in the white rectangle) to match the resolution of the KCWI white-light image. Right: KCWI white-light image with yellow-magenta regions overlaid such that the regions coincide with the brightness maxima. The spectra were extracted from the KCWI data cube integrated over all pixels inside the yellow pixel masks (large ovals and small circles). For reference, we also include the position of the Ly- \(\alpha\) blob, marked by the red box, discussed in Section 2.1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：HST F110W滤光波段观测，多重像用黄色椭圆标记。星系外部的核球和显著恒星形成区域分别用黄色和橙色圆圈标记。品红色圆圈突出显示了场中可能在KCWI数据立方体的白光图像中留下信号的其他明亮天体。中心图：HST F110W滤光波段观测（白色矩形内）的下采样版本，以匹配KCWI白光图像的分辨率。右图：KCWI白光图像，叠加了黄-品红色区域，使得这些区域与亮度最大值重合。光谱是从KCWI数据立方体中提取的，积分了黄色像素掩模（大椭圆和小圆）内所有像素。作为参考，我们还标出了第2.1节讨论的Ly- \(\alpha\) 斑块的位置，用红色方框标记。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Left: Raw spectra extracted from the total image areas. The order from top to bottom is chosen to be the same as in the observation. Right: Background and continuum subtracted spectra which were smoothed with a Gaussian filter having \(\sigma=2\) Å.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左图：从总图像区域提取的原始光谱。从上到下的顺序与观测中的顺序相同。右图：背景和连续谱扣除后的光谱，使用具有\(\sigma=2\) Å的高斯滤波器进行了平滑处理。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Background and continuum-subtracted spectra of all three multiple images, smoothed with a Gaussian filter of 2 Å width to alleviate aliasing, same as Fig. 3 (right). The 3- \(\sigma\) band around zero based on the background noise level is shaded. The 17 absorption and ten emission lines above 3 \(\sigma\) are marked in each spectrum as dotted lines upwards (emission) and downwards (absorption), respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：所有三个多重像的背景和连续谱扣除光谱，使用2 Å宽度的高斯滤波器进行平滑以减轻混叠，与图3（右图）相同。基于背景噪声水平的零线周围的3- \(\sigma\) 带被阴影化。每个光谱中高于3 \(\sigma\) 的17条吸收线和10条发射线分别用向上（发射）和向下（吸收）的虚线标记。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Observed spectral features above 3 \(\sigma\) and possible identifications as emission and absorption lines. 2 2 2 Columns: Observed wavelength, \(\lambda_{{obs}}\) , S/N, name of the line, rest-frame emission wavelength, \(\lambda_{{em}}\) , estimated redshift and uncertainty, analogous to Eq. ( 1 ). The analysis is performed for lines around \(z\approx 0.82\) (columns 3-6) and \(z\approx 3.20\) (columns 7-10). The upper part lists absorption lines, the lower one emission lines. Italic printed line names are suboptimal identifications and not taken into account in the overall redshift determination. Extending the wavelength range beyond 5500 Å, Griffiths et al. ( 2021 ) identified an absorption feature at 5600 Å attributed to an observationally rare TiII line with \(\lambda_{{em}}=3075\) Å at \(z=0.82\) . For \(z\approx 3.2\) , this line is a more common CII line with \(\lambda_{{em}}=1334.5\) Å.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：观测到的高于3 \(\sigma\) 的光谱特征以及可能的发射线和吸收线识别。2 2 2 列：观测波长\(\lambda_{{obs}}\)、信噪比、谱线名称、静止系发射波长\(\lambda_{{em}}\)、估计红移及不确定性，类似于方程(1)。分析针对红移约为0.82（第3-6列）和红移约为3.20（第7-10列）的谱线进行。上半部分列出吸收线，下半部分列出发射线。斜体印刷的谱线名称是次优识别，未纳入整体红移确定。将波长范围扩展到5500 Å以上，Griffiths等人(2021)在5600 Å处识别出一个吸收特征，归因于一条观测上罕见的TiII线，其\(\lambda_{{em}}=3075\) Å，红移为z=0.82。对于红移约为3.2，这条线是更常见的CII线，其\(\lambda_{{em}}=1334.5\) Å。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Background and continuum subtracted spectra for all multiple images over the entire image regions (dark colours) as in Fig. 4 and omitting the SFR in the left part of the images (brighter colours). Dotted lines to the top and bottom mark emission and absorption lines above 3 \(\sigma\) beyond noise level as listed in Table 2 , respectively. Salient regions are the lines around 4770 Å as well as the last two significant absorption features.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：所有多重像在整个图像区域（深色）的背景和连续谱扣除光谱，与图4相同，并省略了图像左侧的恒星形成区域（较亮颜色）。向上和向下的虚线分别标记了高于3 \(\sigma\) 噪声水平的发射线和吸收线，如表2所列。显著区域是4770 Å附近的谱线以及最后两个显著吸收特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Wavelength calibration performed by PypeIt : Typical quality assessment plot for one slit in which the identified FeAr emission lines are marked on top of the measured spectrum (left plot). Then, these lines and their known wavelength differences are used to convert the pixel-based spectrum into a wavelength-based one (right plot). (The fitted function is a Legendre polynomial of order 1 by default, applied to each slit. The joint wavelength function employing all slits is of order 4.)
figures.caption_zh: 图6：PypeIt执行的波长校准：一个狭缝的典型质量评估图，其中识别的FeAr发射线标记在测量光谱上方（左图）。然后，这些谱线及其已知波长差用于将基于像素的光谱转换为基于波长的光谱（右图）。（默认情况下，拟合函数是应用于每个狭缝的1阶勒让德多项式。使用所有狭缝的联合波长函数为4阶。）

title: HI 21-cm absorption in low- and high-excitation radio-loud AGNs at $z<0.5$ from MALS
summary: We present results from a search of cold neutral gas associated with radio-loud active galactic nuclei (AGNs) at $z < 0.5$ using HI 21-cm absorption measurements from the MeerKAT Absorption Line Survey (MALS). Cross-matching the MALS 1006 MHz and SDSS DR18 catalogs yields 1908 radio sources at $z < 0.5$. Of these, 613 are classified as AGNs using BPT diagnostics and radio luminosity criteria. We further classify 426 AGNs into 327 low-excitation radio galaxies (LERGs) and 99 high-excitation radio galaxies (HERGs). We observe a significant ($>3σ$) difference in $k$-corrected $g-r$ color, consistent with LERGs residing in older galaxies with quenched star formation. We searched a radio-bright subsample of 79 LERGs and 20 HERGs ($S_{\mathrm{1.4\,GHz}} > 4$ mJy) for associated HI 21-cm absorption. This spans six decades in radio luminosity ($\log L_{\mathrm{1.4\,GHz}}$ (WHz$^{-1}$) $\sim 21.1-27.0$), probing an order of magnitude fainter than previous targeted HI surveys. We report five new detections (4 LERGs, 1 HERG) at $0.29 < z < 0.47$. The overall detection rate of $3^{+3}_{-2}$% (at a $3σ$ threshold of 10.0 kms$^{-1}$) is consistent with sensitivity-matched low-$z$ ($<0.2$) samples, suggesting no significant redshift evolution out to $z \sim 0.5$ or dependence on radio luminosity. Evaluating velocity offset, asymmetry, and width reveals three systems with entirely redshifted absorption and two with predominantly blueshifted absorption. HI profiles in LERGs show diverse asymmetries and velocity offsets exceeding 350 kms$^{-1}$, indicating disturbed cold-gas kinematics likely driven by lobe expansion or jet activity.

AI.tldr: 使用MeerKAT吸收线巡天在z<0.5的射电噪活动星系核中搜索中性氢21厘米吸收，发现LERGs和HERGs在星系颜色上存在显著差异，HI吸收探测率为3%，表明在z~0.5内没有明显的红移演化或射电光度依赖性。
AI.motivation: 研究低红移(z<0.5)射电噪活动星系核中的冷中性气体分布，探索LERGs和HERGs在星系性质上的差异，以及HI吸收探测率是否随红移或射电光度变化。
AI.method: 使用MeerKAT吸收线巡天(MALS)的HI 21厘米吸收测量，交叉匹配MALS 1006 MHz和SDSS DR18星表，获得1908个z<0.5的射电源。使用BPT诊断和射电光度标准将613个源分类为AGN，进一步分为327个LERGs和99个HERGs。在射电亮度较高的子样本(79个LERGs和20个HERGs)中搜索HI吸收。
AI.result: 发现LERGs和HERGs在k校正后的g-r颜色上存在显著差异(>3σ)，表明LERGs位于恒星形成已停止的较老星系中。在搜索的99个AGN中探测到5个新的HI吸收系统(4个LERGs，1个HERG)，总体探测率为3%。探测率与灵敏度匹配的低红移(z<0.2)样本一致，表明在z~0.5内没有明显的红移演化或射电光度依赖性。HI谱线显示多样的不对称性和速度偏移，表明冷气体运动学受到射电瓣膨胀或喷流活动的影响。
AI.conclusion: LERGs和HERGs在星系性质上存在显著差异，LERGs位于更老的星系中。HI吸收探测率在z~0.5内保持稳定，没有明显的红移演化。冷气体运动学显示扰动特征，可能与射电活动有关。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要研究低红移射电噪AGN中的HI 21厘米吸收，与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振、高红移多相气体）的直接匹配度很低。论文不涉及引力透镜，不涉及高红移（z<0.5），不涉及星系动力学或运动学，不涉及偏振，也不涉及多相气体。用户核心作者列表中无任何作者出现。因此，该论文与用户研究画像的关联性非常弱。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题（低红移射电噪AGN的HI吸收）与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系）不匹配；红移范围（z<0.5）远低于用户关注的高红移（宇宙正午附近）；不涉及用户优先关注的任何核心科学问题或方法。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用MeerKAT吸收线巡天（MALS）的HI 21厘米吸收测量，展示了与射电噪活动星系核（AGNs）在$z < 0.5$处相关的冷中性气体的搜索结果。将MALS 1006 MHz和SDSS DR18星表交叉匹配，得到$z < 0.5$处的1908个射电源。其中，613个使用BPT诊断和射电光度标准被分类为AGNs。我们进一步将426个AGNs分为327个低激发射电星系（LERGs）和99个高激发射电星系（HERGs）。我们观察到$k$修正的$g-r$颜色存在显著（$>3σ$）差异，这与LERGs位于恒星形成已熄灭的更古老星系中一致。我们搜索了一个由79个LERGs和20个HERGs（$S_{\mathrm{1.4\,GHz}} > 4$ mJy）组成的射电明亮子样本，寻找相关的HI 21厘米吸收。这涵盖了六个数量级的射电光度（$\log L_{\mathrm{1.4\,GHz}}$ (WHz$^{-1}$) $\sim 21.1-27.0$），探测深度比以往有针对性的HI巡天暗一个数量级。我们报告了在$0.29 < z < 0.47$处的五个新探测结果（4个LERGs，1个HERG）。总体探测率为$3^{+3}_{-2}$%（在10.0 km s$^{-1}$的$3σ$阈值下），与灵敏度匹配的低红移（$<0.2$）样本一致，表明在$z \sim 0.5$之前没有显著的红移演化或对射电光度的依赖性。评估速度偏移、不对称性和宽度，揭示了三个完全红移吸收系统和两个以蓝移吸收为主的系统。LERGs中的HI轮廓显示出多样的不对称性和超过350 km s$^{-1}$的速度偏移，表明由瓣膨胀或喷流活动驱动的扰动冷气体运动学。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：LERGs和HERGs在星系性质上存在显著差异，LERGs位于更老的星系中。HI吸收探测率在z~0.5内保持稳定，没有明显的红移演化。冷气体运动学显示扰动特征，可能与射电活动有关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of \(z\) ( first panel ), S \({}_{1.4\,GHz}\) ( second ), L 1.4GHz ( third ) and S/N of [O iii ] \(\lambda\) 5007 ( fourth ) for the initial sample of 1908 radio sources (yellow histograms). Of these, 681 are classified as AGNs (blue; see Sections 2.3 and 2.4 for details). Finally, 99 LERGs/HERGs from this subsample were searched for associated H i 21-cm absorption (green hatched; details in Section 3 ). The low- \(z\) deficit in the green histogram reflects the paucity of sources exceeding the 4 mJy flux density cut applied for the 21-cm absorption search.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：初始1908个射电源样本（黄色直方图）的\(z\)（第一面板）、S \({}_{1.4\,GHz}\)（第二面板）、L 1.4GHz（第三面板）和[O iii ] \(\lambda\) 5007的信噪比（第四面板）分布。其中，681个被分类为AGNs（蓝色；详见第2.3和2.4节）。最后，从该子样本中搜索了99个LERGs/HERGs的相关HI 21厘米吸收（绿色阴影；详见第3节）。绿色直方图中低红移的缺失反映了超过用于21厘米吸收搜索的4 mJy流量密度截止的源数量稀少。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: The GELATO Emission Line Dictionary used in this work. Emission lines are grouped into Species , and Species into Groups . Lines belonging to a given Species (e.g., [S ii ] \(\lambda 6716.44\) and [S ii ] \(\lambda 6730.82\) ]) must share common kinematics, namely, redshift and velocity dispersion. Additional components, Outflow for [O iii ] and Broad for Balmer lines, and the constraints imposed on their kinematical properties are discussed in Section 2.3 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中使用的GELATO发射线词典。发射线按物种分组，物种再按组分组。属于给定物种（例如，[S ii ] \(\lambda 6716.44\)和[S ii ] \(\lambda 6730.82\) ]）的线必须共享共同的运动学，即红移和速度弥散。额外的成分，[O iii ]的外流和巴耳末线的宽成分，以及对其运动学性质施加的限制在第2.3节中讨论。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: S/N distribution of various lines used for AGN / SF classification, and the location of sources in the L \({}_{1.4\,GHz}\) – \(z\) plane based on the classification method (details in Section 2.4 ). Sources with line S/N \( -1 ) marks the boundary segregating SF and AGN-dominated sources according to Pracy et al. ( 2016 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：用于AGN/SF分类的各种线的信噪比分布，以及基于分类方法（详见第2.4节）源在L \({}_{1.4\,GHz}\) – \(z\)平面上的位置。线信噪比 \( -1 ) 的源标记了根据Pracy等人（2016）划分SF和AGN主导源的边界。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: BPT1 classified AGN, SF, and Composite (COMP) galaxies color-coded according to their 1.4 GHz radio luminosity (L \({}_{1.4\,GHz}).\)
figures.caption_zh: 图3：BPT1分类的AGN、SF和复合（COMP）星系，根据其1.4 GHz射电光度（L \({}_{1.4\,GHz}）\)进行颜色编码。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Summary of classification of 1300 out of 1533 sources with [O iii ] detected at S/N \(>\) 1 into AGN, SF or composite galaxies. 233 sources remain unclassified. Table 6 presents the full sample. 3 3 3 † Includes 68 radio-quiet AGN with only narrow Balmer lines.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：对1533个源中1300个[O iii ]检测信噪比 \(>\) 1的源进行分类为AGN、SF或复合星系的总结。233个源仍未分类。表6给出了完整样本。3 3 3 † 包括68个仅具有窄巴耳末线的射电宁静AGN。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: BPT classified AGN and SF galaxies with only narrow Balmer lines in the L Hα – L \({}_{1.4\,GHz}\) plane. The dashed line (black) marks the conservative division between AGN and SF galaxies from Best & Heckman ( 2012 ) , and the contours correspond to SF galaxies. The dotted line represents the criteria used to exclude radio-quiet optical AGNs (RQAGN). The vertical line marks the SF/AGN division, where sources with \(L_{1.4\,{GHz}}>10^{24}\,{W\,Hz^{-1}}\) are classified as AGNs.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在L Hα – L \({}_{1.4\,GHz}\)平面中，仅具有窄巴耳末线的BPT分类AGN和SF星系。虚线（黑色）标记了Best & Heckman（2012）提出的AGN和SF星系之间的保守划分，等值线对应SF星系。点线表示用于排除射电宁静光学AGN（RQAGN）的标准。垂直线标记了SF/AGN划分，其中 \(L_{1.4\,{GHz}}>10^{24}\,{W\,Hz^{-1}}\) 的源被分类为AGNs。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Distribution of \(\alpha_{1.0}^{1.4}\) ( first ), L 1.4GHz ( second ), S 1.0GHz ( third ), \(z\) ( fourth ), and \(k\) -corrected \(g-r\) ( fifth ) for the LERG and HERG samples. The red and black dashed lines mark the median values for LERGs and HERGs, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：LERG和HERG样本的 \(\alpha_{1.0}^{1.4}\)（第一面板）、L 1.4GHz（第二面板）、S 1.0GHz（第三面板）、\(z\)（第四面板）和 \(k\) 修正的 \(g-r\)（第五面板）分布。红色和黑色虚线分别标记了LERGs和HERGs的中值。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Statistical comparison between LERG (327) and HERG (99) samples. The reported uncertainties correspond to the median absolute deviation (MAD).
figures.caption_zh: 表3：LERG（327个）和HERG（99个）样本之间的统计比较。报告的不确定度对应中值绝对偏差（MAD）。
